roleDescription:
Patrique Mercier Recruitment FR is excited to offer an exceptional opportunity for a Polish Speaking Customer Service Agent to join a vibrant team in Sofia, Bulgaria. This role includes a fully paid relocation package, providing an ideal chance for passionate customer service professionals eager to advance their careers while experiencing a new culture.


Responsibilities

  • Provide high-quality customer service to Polish-speaking customers across multiple communication channels such as phone, email, and chat.
  • Assist customers with inquiries related to products, orders, returns, and general support.
  • Efficiently resolve customer issues and complaints to ensure satisfaction.
  • Maintain accurate records of customer interactions in the CRM system.
  • Collaborate with other teams to improve processes and enhance the customer experience.
  • Engage in continuous learning to increase product knowledge and customer service skills.
roleRequirements:
• Fluency in Polish and English, both written and spoken.
  • Previous experience in customer service roles, preferably in a related industry.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Strong problem-solving abilities with a customer-oriented mindset.
  • Proficiency in customer service software and Microsoft Office applications.
  • Highly organized and detail-oriented.
  • Willingness to relocate to Sofia with all relocation expenses fully covered.
roleTitle: Polish Speaking Customer Service Agent - Work In Sofia - Fully Paid Relocation
